name: Pineapple Dream Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, beat butter and 1/3 cup brown sugar until combined.
3. Blend in 1 cup flour until the mixture is crumbly.
4. Pat the batter into the bottom of a 13x9-inch baking pan.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 15 minutes or until golden. Keep the oven hot and remove the pan to cool.
6. Drain pineapple well, pressing out excess liquid with the back of a spoon.
7. In a large bowl, combine the remaining 2/3 cup brown sugar until thick.
8. In a small bowl, combine the remaining 1/3 cup flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt. Stir in the extract and eggs.
9. Fold the pineapple, coconut, nuts, and cherries into the batter.
10. Spread over the baked crust.
11. Bake for an additional 30 minutes or until set. Cool slightly on a wire rack before cutting into bars. Makes 18 bars.
